top_signals.title: Baghdadi Capital integrates Qasioun Partners, Strengthening Its Financial Advisory Proposition
top_signals.summary: Baghdadi Capital, a global independent family office specialising in corporate and investment banking, announces the integration of Qasioun Partners, a new firm specialising in Advisory Finance and Investment Banking, which joins the Group with its own capital structure.
